indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows can lead to glare and distractions from outside activities.

indicators.name: dark flooring
indicators.rationale: Dark flooring can make it difficult to see computer screens clearly.

indicators.name: low ceiling height
indicators.rationale: Low ceiling height can create a feeling of claustrophobia and reduce focus.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large windows, dark flooring, and low ceiling height create potential distractions and discomfort. The absence of a flat personal work surface is the most significant barrier to setting up a computer workstation.
